title: dianthus langeanus
intro: Dianthus langeanus, also known as the Chinese carnation or pink feather grass, is a perennial flowering plant native to China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Dianthus langeanus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried flower, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice to treat wounds and skin conditions.
